'''''Kragg's Fury''''' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Dread Buccaneer]] [[Hez Kragg]].

Roughly the size of a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]], ''Kragg's Fury'' was hidden in the [[System VV-99-7JE-2N71]] shortly before Kragg's death.

When a failed attempt led by [[Jonas Durns]] to secure the rumored [[Nijune Treasure Fleet]]'s riches from ''Kragg's Fury'' triggered its automated defenses, the ship projected itself into the nearest star.

The ''Kragg's Fury'' was armed with [[power turret]]s, [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] and [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile tubes]], and was equipped with [[grappler claw]]s and [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]].
